Mini templating code golf challenge: replace variables in a string using values from an object. We’ve given a JavaScript example but you can use any language you want. The shortest solution wins!
Think about how you'd find all the placeholders at once, then swap each one dynamically.

A concise solution uses a regular expression to match {{key}} patterns globally. The captured key is passed into a replacement function that looks up the value in the provided object. If the key is missing, return a safe default such as an empty string.
